cuppingSession.blind_cupping: When Blind Cupping mode is enabled, information such as batch code, green bean code, and green bean name will be hidden. Cuppers will only see serial numbers (1, 2, 3, ...). This helps reduce bias when scoring. Only the session creator can view the actual information.

home page.coffee cupping management platform direc: Coffee Cupping Management Platform Directly on the Website
home page.optimized for mobile devices, allowing y: Optimized for mobile devices, allowing you to score cups right at the tasting table. WeSlurp lets you record, store, and compare cupping results anywhere, from anyone, with just your phone.
